title: Peppery French Coconut Crumble
description: A vibrant and energizing dessert dish featuring a blend of peppery flavors with a coconut milk base, topped with a fragrant crumbly crust thats perfect for breakfast or snack time.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix coconut milk with peppermint extract until thoroughly combined.
Combine flaxseed meal and maple syrup in a separate bowl. Add to the coconut mixture and stir well.
Gradually fold in unsweetened shredded coconut and cinnamon powder into the wet mixture, ensuring all ingredients are evenly distributed.
In another bowl, combine almond flour with sesame seeds and salt. Mix until thoroughly combined.
Transfer half of the coconut crumble mixture into a baking dish and press it down gently to form a crust layer.
Pour remaining coconut mixture on top of the crust layer, smoothing out any air bubbles with your fingers or spatula.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20 minutes until golden brown and crispy on top. Allow it to cool completely before serving.
Serve chilled as a dessert with a drizzle of maple syrup over the crumble if desired.
